items.description: Represents a domain connected to a HubSpot CMS site

id.description: The unique identifier for the domain

domain.description: The actual domain or sub-domain (e.g., www.hubspot.com)

updatedAt.description: When the domain was last updated

isResolving.description: Whether the DNS for this domain is optimally configured for use with HubSpot

isManuallyMarkedAsResolving.description: Whether the domain has been manually marked as resolving

isSslEnabled.description: Whether SSL is enabled for this domain

isSslOnly.description: Whether the domain only accepts HTTPS connections

isPrimaryBlogPost.description: Whether this is the primary domain for blog posts

isPrimarySitePage.description: Whether this is the primary domain for site pages

isPrimaryLandingPage.description: Whether this is the primary domain for landing pages

isPrimaryEmail.description: Whether this is the primary domain for email web pages

isPrimaryKnowledge.description: Whether this is the primary domain for knowledge base

isUsedForBlogPost.description: Whether the domain is used for CMS blog posts

isUsedForSitePage.description: Whether the domain is used for CMS site pages

isUsedForLandingPage.description: Whether the domain is used for CMS landing pages

isUsedForEmail.description: Whether the domain is used for CMS email web pages

isUsedForKnowledge.description: Whether the domain is used for CMS knowledge pages

expectedCname.description: The expected CNAME record for this domain

redirectTo.description: The domain to redirect to, if any

secondaryToDomain.description: The primary domain this domain is secondary to

next.description: Information about the next page of results

after.description: The cursor token for the next page

link.description: A direct link to the next page
